Operation 'get_vlakken' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description use vague Dutch terminology without explaining what vlakken are. Missing context about pagination mechanics, filtering capabilities, and return data structure. Improved version clarifies that vlakken are surface water body polygons, explains pagination, indicates filtering support, and describes expected output for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: vlakken collection call (overzicht). Gepagineerd per 100 records.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve surface water body polygons collection
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated collection of surface water body polygons (vlakken) representing areal water features within the RWS management area. Results are paginated with 100 records per page. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters to find specific water bodies by attributes such as name, district, or water type. Returns a collection of polygon geometries and associated metadata for each surface water body.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description use vague Dutch terminology without explaining what vlakken are. Missing context about pagination mechanics, filtering capabilities, and return data structure. Improved version clarifies that vlakken are surface water body polygons, explains pagination, indicates filtering support, and describes expected output for better AI agent understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve surface water body polygon details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific surface water body polygon (vlak) identified by its unique ID. Returns complete polygon geometry, spatial boundaries, and all associated metadata including name, district classification, water type, and KRW (Water Framework Directive) attributes. Use this operation when you need comprehensive information about a particular water body feature.
